project.name: 经观 EconView
project.topic: 全球宏观经济指标数据要素采集与结构化服务
project.positioning: 全球宏观经济数据治理与分析平台：official macro data API + standardization + quality governance + dashboard

minimum_acceptance.requirement: 能够成功运行并完成至少 20 条示例查询
说明每条查询结果的来源机构与数据集
不能以手工 Excel 代替工具能力
minimum_acceptance.evidence: programmatic official API calls; CSV files are dictionaries only

minimum_acceptance.requirement: 不能输出无法追溯来源的黑盒数据

scoring_alignment.current_design: World Bank, BLS, Eurostat, IMF DataMapper, OECD SDMX, ECB Data API and BIS Statistics API; source metadata returned with every series.
8 countries/regions, 18 standardized indicators, unified code/unit/frequency/calculation fields.

scoring_alignment.dimension: 工具可用性与结构化输出
scoring_alignment.current_design: Web app, JSON API, batch query, visualization payload, country comparison, consistency check and machine-readable schema.
File cache, retry mechanism, structured errors, smoke tests and zero-dependency launch scripts.
README, deployment notes, report outline, submission checklist and generated dictionaries.

recommended_demo_flow.purpose: prove World Bank official API connection
prove BLS monthly data and derived YoY calculation
prove Eurostat monthly connector and new production indicator
show presentation-ready interpretation and report paragraph
prove standardized output and data governance
show scoring evidence and submission completeness

known_risks: BLS API may be slow or timeout in some networks; retry and structured error response are implemented.
V1 covers World Bank, BLS, Eurostat, IMF, OECD, ECB and BIS with representative official indicators.
File cache is suitable for demo and lightweight deployment; production can upgrade to SQLite or DuckDB.

datasets: HICP - monthly data (annual rate of change)
Long-term interest rates for convergence purposes
Short-term business statistics - producer prices in industry
Short-term business statistics - production in industry
Short-term business statistics - retail trade volume

sources.organization: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development

checks.detail: 7 sources implemented: BIS, BLS, ECB, Eurostat, IMF, OECD, World Bank
18/18 indicators include required indicator and source fields.
HICP, PPI, industrial production, retail sales and long-term rates are mapped to Eurostat datasets.
All implemented sources return through standardize_series with series, quality_report, lineage and error.
Online checks require all non-BLS representative queries to return data; BLS network timeouts must be exposed as structured upstream errors.

consistency.interpretation: This payload proves that multiple official sources share the same response schema, quality report and lineage fields.

capabilities.description: 全球宏观经济数据治理与分析平台，提供官方宏观数据查询、标准化 JSON、质量报告和数据血缘。
capabilities.slogan: 观全球经济，见数据脉络。

endpoints.purpose: human-readable query insight and report paragraph
competition scoring evidence and acceptance checklist
AI Agent tool definitions and parameter schemas
machine-readable error codes and recovery hints

recommended_agent_flow: Call /capabilities to discover countries, indicators and endpoints.
Call /search-indicators when the user describes an indicator in natural language.
Call /series for a single standardized time series.
Call /batch-query when the user asks for several series at once.
Call /visualization when a chart-ready payload is required.
Call /insight when a human-readable interpretation or report paragraph is required.
Call /consistency to verify cross-source schema, metadata and lineage consistency.
Inspect error.code and use /error-catalog for recovery guidance.
